Electronic Press Kit
Not for the charts. Not for the fame.
For everyone who's ever needed a song to say what they couldn't.

About The Band
Who We Are

2DieFor is a Finnish music project born not from ambition, but from necessity. A place to put the things that have no other place to go — the anger, the grief, the memories that won't stay quiet.

Their sound sits at the intersection of heavy metal vulnerability and alternative pop-rock accessibility. Songs built on raw emotion, cinematic atmosphere, and the kind of honesty that makes listeners feel less alone at 3am.

The songs come from real experiences. Real pain. Real people. When someone hears a track and says "I felt that" or "I've been there" — that's the whole point. That connection is worth more than any chart position.

Every video, every production, every frame — made entirely in-house. This isn't background noise. It's the opposite of everything music has become.

Working Graves
Dark, groove-driven commentary on the exhaustion of modern existence.

House of Monsters
An atmospheric descent into the shadows we build around ourselves.

Crimson Carousel
Hypnotic and unsettling — a spiral that keeps pulling you back in.

07
Drink Till I Bleed

A defiant refusal. Hard-edged, sharp-tongued, and ferociously alive.
